configuration.description: The configuration of the batch task.

className.description: Full qualified name of the target entity (e.g. 'com.liferay.account.dto.v1_0.Account').

companyId.description: The company ID of the virtual Liferay instance.

userId.description: The user ID that is being used to run the batch task.

callbackURL.description: Optional callback URL. The batch engine will send the status of the batch import to this URL.

parameters.description: Additional parameters passed to the batch execution. Can be used to define import strategies etc.

taskItemDelegateName.description: Name of a custom task delegate component.

version.description: The API-version of the Headless REST API.

items.description: Array of items to be imported. Each item is an object of the type defined in the 'className' property of the 'configuration' property.
A single item to be imported.

externalReferenceCode.description: External reference code of the item.
